metadata.description: A curated collection of reusable Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: typescript-standards
plugins.description: Enforce type-safe TypeScript patterns with Zod validation, pattern matching, and discriminated unions to prevent runtime errors

plugins.name: oss-security-audit
plugins.description: Security audit of third-party packages (npm, pip, homebrew, cargo…) — detects network calls, telemetry, eval, install hooks and recursively audits same-author dependencies
